title: BanglaHost Documentation
content:
BanglaHost Documentation

The ultimate local web development environment for Windows. Built with .NET 8 and WinUI 3.

title: Installation Guide
content:
Installation Guide

Getting BanglaHost running on your Windows machine is incredibly simple.

Method 1: Microsoft Store (Recommended)

The easiest way to install and keep BanglaHost updated is via the Microsoft Store.

title: Quick Start
content:
Quick Start

Create your first local development site in seconds.

1. Launch BanglaHost

Open the BanglaHost application from your Start Menu. On first launch, it will initialize the core services (Nginx, PHP, MySQL).

title: System Requirements
content:
System Requirements

Minimum Requirements

OSWindows 10 (Version 1809 or higher) or Windows 11

title: Architecture
content:
Architecture & Developer Guide

BanglaHost is a modern Windows desktop application built with .NET 8 and WinUI 3 (Windows App SDK).

Project Structure


src/
├── Bang

title: Databases
content:
Databases Overview

BanglaHost provides built-in, isolated database servers that run seamlessly in the background without cluttering your system registry or services.

title: MySQL & MariaDB
content:
MySQL & MariaDB

BanglaHost includes isolated instances of MySQL and MariaDB managed via DbServer.cs.

Default Credentials

  • Host: 127.0.0.1
  • Port: 3306 (or c

title: PostgreSQL
content:
PostgreSQL

Managed via PgServer.cs. Fully isolated local PostgreSQL cluster.

  • Port: 5432
  • Default User: postgres

title: MongoDB
content:
MongoDB

NoSQL document database powered by MongoServer.cs.

  • Port: 27017

title: SQLite
content:
SQLite

BanglaHost perfectly supports SQLite databases out of the box. Since SQLite is file-based, no background service is required.

PHP comes with the pdo_sqlite and sqlite3 extensions pre-enabled.

title: Redis
content:
Redis Cache

In-memory data structure store, used as a database, cache, and message broker. Managed via RedisManager.cs and configured in the RedisPage.xaml.

  • Port: 6379

title: PHP Environment
content:
PHP Environment

BanglaHost allows you to run multiple PHP versions simultaneously (via FastCGI / PhpCgi.cs).

Features

  • Switch PHP versions per site (e.g., Site A on PHP 7.4, Site B on PHP 8.3).

title: Python
content:
Python

Run Python web applications (Flask, Django, FastAPI) natively on Windows via PySite.cs. BanglaHost manages virtual environments (venv) automatically.

title: Node.js
content:
Node.js

Deploy Node.js apps (Express, Next.js, Nuxt) easily using NodeSite.cs. Select Node versions dynamically.

title: Go
content:
Go (Golang)

Compile and serve Go applications using GoSite.cs. Reverse proxy is automatically configured via Nginx.

title: Rust
content:
Rust

Run Rust web frameworks (Actix, Rocket) via RustSite.cs with automated port forwarding.

title: Project Dashboard
content:
Project Dashboard

The Dashboard (DashboardPage.xaml) is your command center.

  • View all running sites.
  • Access one-click buttons to open the site in browser, open the terminal, or open the folder.

title: Runtime Manager
content:
Runtime Manager

The Runtime Manager (RuntimesPage.xaml) allows you to download and manage different versions of languages (PHP, Node, Python) without polluting your system PATH.

title: Environment Manager
content:
Environment Manager

Manage global environment variables securely from the EnvManagerPage.xaml.

title: Performance Monitor
content:
Performance Monitor

Integrated directly into the Dashboard, powered by SystemMetrics.cs. Monitor real-time memory and CPU consumption of Nginx, Apache, Databases, and your application runtimes.

title: Terminal
content:
Built-in Terminal

Use the TerminalPage.xaml to access PowerShell or CMD directly within BanglaHost. The terminal is automatically injected with the correct environment variables for the selected site.

title: Logs
content:
Logs Viewer

Access Nginx, Apache, PHP, and Database error/access logs in real-time from the LogsPage.xaml.

title: Site Backup
content:
Backup

Create zip archives of your entire site directory and database dump with a single click (implemented in SiteListControl.xaml.cs).

title: Site Restore
content:
Restore

Restore your site files and database from a previously generated BanglaHost backup archive.

title: Clone Site
content:
Clone Site

Duplicate an existing project to a new domain for safe staging and testing. The clone process copies files and duplicates the database automatically.

title: SSL Certificates
content:
Auto SSL

BanglaHost automatically generates trusted self-signed certificates and configures Nginx (NginxConfig.cs) to serve your local sites over HTTPS without browser warnings.

title: Cloudflare Tunnel
content:
Cloudflare Tunnel

Share your local site with the world securely. Handled by Tunnel.cs and TunnelService.cs, you can expose your local .test domain to a public URL instantly via Cloudflare.

title: Git Integration
content:
Git Integration

Manage your repository status, commit, and push directly from the GitPage.xaml.

title: Docker Integration
content:
Docker Support

Control Docker containers and view images from the DockerPage.xaml. BanglaHost interfaces with Docker Desktop on Windows.

title: Composer
content:
Composer (PHP)

The PHP package manager is pre-installed and available in the BanglaHost Terminal. Handled by Downloader.cs.

title: WP-CLI
content:
WP-CLI

Manage your WordPress installations from the command line without configuring PHP paths manually.

title: Mailpit
content:
Local Email Testing

Catch outgoing emails from your web apps using Mailpit (Mailpit.cs). View sent emails in the web UI without actually sending them to real addresses.

title: AI Assistant (Ollama)
content:
AI Assistant (Ollama)

BanglaHost includes a built-in AI Assistant interface (AiAssistantPage.xaml) that connects to Ollama, allowing you to run local LLMs for code generation and assistance directly within the IDE.

title: API Client
content:
API Client

Test REST APIs, GraphQL endpoints, and WebSockets directly from the ApiClientPage.xaml, similar to Postman.

title: Cron Scheduler
content:
Cron Scheduler

Run background tasks or scheduled scripts using CronScheduler.cs and CronPage.xaml. Perfect for WordPress cron or custom scheduled jobs.

title: Security
content:
Security

BanglaHost uses a specialized elevation process (BanglaHost.Elevate) to modify the hosts file safely. Furthermore, it interacts with Windows Defender (WindowsDefender.cs) to add exclusions for project folders to improve I/O

title: Configuration
content:
Configuration

Global app settings can be adjusted in the SettingsPage.xaml. Configurations are saved as JSON files in the app data directory.

title: Troubleshooting
content:
Troubleshooting

  • Port Conflicts: If Nginx fails to start, ensure Skype or IIS are not using port 80/443.
  • Hosts File Error: Ensure your Antivirus isnt blocking modifications to C:\Windows\System

title: FAQ
content: Frequently Asked Questions

title: Roadmap
content:
Roadmap

Upcoming features for BanglaHost include:

  • macOS & Linux Support (via .NET MAUI)
  • Advanced team sharing and sync
  • Deeper Docker container orchestration

title: Contributing
content:
Contributing

We welcome contributions! Please check the GitHub repository for open issues and submit Pull Requests. Ensure you follow our code style guidelines for C# / WinUI 3.

content: About the Developer

content:

  • Initial release with PHP, Node, Python, Go, Rust support.
  • Integrated MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, SQLite.
